---
title: "HISP IE in Practice: Full Code"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    code-links:
      - text: Lab
        href: hisp_ie_practice_lab.html
      - text: Evaluated Code
        href: hisp_ie_practice_lab_evaluated_code.html
      - text: QA Log
        href: hisp_ie_practice_lab_qa_log.html
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This document contains the complete executable R script for `hisp_ie_practice_lab.qmd`.

```{r}
#| include: false
source("hisp_ie_practice_lab_full_code.R", local = knitr::knit_global())
```

```{r}
#| results: asis
cat("```r\n")
cat(readLines("hisp_ie_practice_lab_full_code.R"), sep = "\n")
cat("\n```")
```
